description_for_human: Portfolio profissional de Nei Girão, Product Manager com +15 anos de experiência em Observabilidade e Produtos Digitais.
description_for_model: This is the professional portfolio of Nei Girão, a senior Product Manager with 15+ years of experience in Observability (Dynatrace, Grafana, Azure Monitor), Digital Products, and Data-Driven Strategy. The site contains his work experience (Icatu, Oi, TIM, Globo), projects, skills, education (MBA in IT Management), and methodology. Use /llms.txt for a machine-readable summary. Use /about.txt for a human-readable summary. The site is in Brazilian Portuguese.
